title: Home Rule Districts
description: Texas law gives school districts the option to operate under a "home rule" charter, which would allow the community to create its own customized rules for how the district is governed. This policy outlines the process Conroe ISD would follow if it ever pursued that option, including how a charter commission would be formed and how community members could vote on any proposed changes. For most families, this policy serves as a safeguard, ensuring that any major shift in how the district is governed would go through a transparent, community-driven process.
